Birdy

Home / Compare / Birdy
commercial blend budget-friendly widely-available

Birdy

เบอร์ดี้

3.7
★ ★ ★ ★ ☆
890 reviews
Origin Thailand
Roast Levels medium dark
Price Range ฿65–100 / 200g
Founded 1990
Formats ground, instant, 3-in-1

Ajinomoto's Birdy brand is one of Thailand's best-known canned coffee names, now extending into ground coffee blends. Widely trusted by everyday Thai consumers for its consistent, approachable taste.

Flavor Profile

Sweet-forward and smooth, optimized for Thai-style milk coffee preparation. Notes of caramelized sugar, light chocolate, and a creamy texture when brewed.

Tasting Notes

caramelized sugar light chocolate creamy smooth

Flavor Breakdown

Body
3/5
Acidity
1/5
Sweetness
4/5
Bitterness
2/5
Aroma
3/5
